# Title
> Aleiwa LLM index for structured discovery of DNS, ASN, and blog pages.

This file provides a concise, machine-readable entrypoint for LLMs.  
Source of truth is the sitemap: https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap.xml.

## Docs
- [Canonical site](https://www.aleiwa.com/): Reference link
- [Sitemap index](https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap.xml): Reference link
- [Child sitemap](https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap-pages.xml): Reference link
- [Child sitemap](https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap-asn.xml): Reference link
- [Child sitemap](https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap-dns.xml): Reference link
- [Child sitemap](https://www.aleiwa.com/sitemap-blog.xml): Reference link
- Generated date: 2026-04-08
- Total URLs: 520
## Policies
- [Privacy policy](https://www.aleiwa.com/privacy.html): Reference link
- [About page](https://www.aleiwa.com/about.html): Reference link
- Per-URL descriptions are extracted from live page title/H1 at generation time.
